name: VAALCO ENERGY INC /DE/
business: We are an independent energy company headquartered in Houston, Texas engaged in the acquisition, exploration, development and production of crude oil, natural gas and NGLs. We have a diversified, African-focused portfolio of production, development and exploration assets located in Gabon, Egypt, Cote d'Ivoire, Equatorial Guinea, Nigeria, as well as, prior to the Canada Asset Divestment, producing properties in Canada.
sellsTo: Crude oil sales are made to third parties, refineries, and government entities; in Egypt, crude oil is sold to the Egyptian General Petroleum Corporation (EGPC).

exposures.sentence: We are an independent energy company headquartered in Houston, Texas engaged in the acquisition, exploration, development and production of crude oil, natural gas and NGLs.

catalysts.event: Return of Baobab FPSO to service
catalysts.sentence: The Baobab FPSO has commenced mobilization back to Cote d Ivoire and is expected to return to offshore Cote d Ivoire by late March 2026, with field production expected to restart in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Start of development drilling program in Cote d'Ivoire
catalysts.sentence: A rig has been secured for the planned development drilling program which is expected to begin during the fourth quarter of 2026 following the FPSO s return to service.
